Note: image is a string with rows separated by \n. Single-row "AB" with scale 3 should return "AAABBB" (each pixel replicated 3 times horizontally; only one row so no vertical replication... wait, scale also replicates vertically). Actually for scale 3 of "AB", expect "AAABBB\nAAABBB\nAAABBB" (3 horizontal copies per pixel, 3 rows). Use scale 2 for simplicity: "AB" with scale 2 returns "AABB\nAABB".

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
